ingredients_text: Cooked Butter Beans (22.6%) (Water, Butter Beans), Cooked Cannellini Beans (22.6%) (Water, Cannellini Beans), Cooked Borlotti Beans (22.6%) (Water, Borlotti Beans), Cooked Red Kidney Beans (16.6%) (Water, Red Kidney Beans), Cooked Black Beans (13.0%) (Water, Black Beans), Italian Extra Virgin Olive Oil (2.0%), Sea Salt (0.6%).
